race.comment: LOOK HERE (8) going nicely through her grades and gets a more economical run today. Started a firm fav when she showed good gate speed from the outside draw to lead them up with a game second over 1600m here. Hard fit now and has genuine prospects. MANZOBEEL (10) handy filly desperate for this trip and further. Back in distance with a fairly average seventh over 1400m at this track.  Has the upside to get the better of these. MR AVERY (6) lightly raced gelding who made rapid improvement in his second prep. Closed strongly to get off the mark at his third race start over 1500m at Albury. Then stretched out to the 2000m with an eye-catching second at Albury on May 15. Returns from a let-up with the two trials and can overcome the awkward gate. RUSSIAN GANGSTER (7) Narrandera winner on debut and looks to have plenty of upside.
